Veterans in Kansas and across the country deserve timely, high-quality care and greater flexibility in choosing when, where, and how to use the health care benefits they have earned through their service. The Take Care of America’s Veterans Acthelps makes certain VA can deliver

My legislation, the Take Care of America’s Veterans Act, would build on the MISSION and Dole Acts to make it easier for veterans, especially those with mental health conditions and addiction issues, to receive life-saving care at VA facilities and in the community.

Through the MISSION Act and Dole Act, VA made $328.6 million in payments last fiscal year to Kansas health care providers who are providing care for local veterans.

This funding helps bolster our state’s hospitals while honoring our commitment to make certain veterans receive

This month, 400,000 bushels of KS grain sorghum were shipped through Food for Peace to combat global hunger. Moving FFP to @USDA brings it closer to the producers who grow the crops that feed hungry people across the globe. I'll keep working to make this move permanent.⬇️
